title: metastelma albiflorum
intro: Metastelma albiflorum, also known as the white flowering metastelma, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. Traditionally, it is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions like acne and eczema. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully confirm its efficacy.
